title: Secretary Naig Announces Record Investments to Expand E15, Biodiesel Availability Statewide
content: Iowa Secretary of Agriculture Mike Naig announced today that the Iowa Renewable Fuels Infrastructure Program (RFIP) Board recently approved 126 project applications from Iowa gas stations for new and expanded E15, E85, and biodiesel infrastructure projects. Totaling nearly $6.35 million dollars, the projects are located across 61 Iowa counties and will allow drivers to save more money by providing more access to lower cost and cleaner burning homegrown biofuels. The awards were made by the RFIP Board during meetings held in August and September.
author: Analysts Account
source: Iowa Department of Agriculture and Land Stewardship
